summary: Applied the ADR 0161 coordination surfaces live on docker-runtime-lv3 from the rebased integration head by fixing the gateway runtime boot path, converging the gateway and interactive ops portal to the host-network runtime topology, and verifying the authenticated coordination and platform reads through the local runtime endpoints.

verification.observed: After the rebased 2026-03-26 `playbooks/api-gateway.yml` converge, `curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <platform token>" http://127.0.0.1:8083/v1/platform/services` on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned HTTP 200 and a catalog payload with `31` services.

`curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <platform token>" http://127.0.0.1:8083/v1/platform/agents` on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned HTTP 200 with the expected ADR 0161 summary payload and an empty `entries` list for the current idle state.

verification.check: Gateway aggregate health endpoint with the portal token path
verification.observed: `curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <platform token>" http://127.0.0.1:8083/v1/platform/health` on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned HTTP 200 after the gateway runtime loaded the controller-managed legacy platform-context token from the canonical repository path.

The rebased 2026-03-26 `playbooks/ops-portal.yml` converge completed successfully, `http://127.0.0.1:8092/health` and `http://127.0.0.1:8092/` both returned HTTP 200 locally, and the previous `Gateway health aggregation is degraded` / `401 Unauthorized` banner no longer appeared in the rendered root page.

notes: The live rollout required finishing several integration fixes that were not part of the original 0.156.0 repo implementation: lazy loading for optional health helper modules inside the gateway image, host-network runtime wiring for the gateway and interactive ops portal, and bounded request-event publishing so `/v1/platform/*` reads do not block on NATS event emission.

Both `playbooks/api-gateway.yml` and `playbooks/ops-portal.yml` were rerun successfully from the rebased `.worktrees/adr-0161-main` integration worktree before the final verification commands were recorded.
